# Form 137 — Elementary Pupil's Permanent Record

Source: **F137-TEMPLATE-FORM-ELEM.pdf** (NPS official). Grade 1–6.

## Header (learner identity)
- Name
- Date of Birth · Gender
- Place of Birth · Nationality
- Father's Name · Occupation
- Mother's Name · Occupation
- Address · **LRN**

## Attendance / enrolment history strip (top table)
Columns: `School Year` · `Date Entered` · `Date Left` · `School Attended` · `Grade` ·
`Days Present` · `Final Rating` · `Action Taken`.

## Per-grade subject grids (Grade 1 → Grade 6)
Six grade blocks, each headed:
- `Grade N /Section:` · `School: Naga Parochial School` · `School Year:`

Each block is a table:

| SUBJECTS | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | Final |
|----------|---|---|---|---|-------|

(Quarters 1–4 + Final column. First row of Grade 1 sample shows `Passed` in the Final
cell.) Below each block: `Promoted to: Grade N+1` · `General Average:`.

Promotion lines present: Promoted to Grade II, III, IV, V, VI, VII — each with its own
`General Average:`.

## Attendance Report (Grade 4-6)
Table: `School Year` · `GRADE LEVEL` · `NUMBER OF SCHOOL DAYS` · `NUMBER OF DAYS PRESENT`.

## Certification
> I CERTIFY that this is a true record of __________. This pupil is eligible for
> admission to **Grade VII**. Copy of this record is sent to the principal of __________
> on __________.

Signatory: **MARITES C. RAMOS, Registrar**.
